title: Strict model-only HF export
summary: Export the custom ConceptLM model weights and configuration into a strict Hugging Face artifact without pretending it is a stock OLMo model.
hypothesis: A model-only artifact can support downstream tooling if custom architecture identity and key validation remain explicit.
design: Map the Megatron distributed checkpoint into custom ConceptLM HF keys, reject unexpected/missing model state and keep runtime compatibility probes separate.

delta.summary: Export the custom ConceptLM model weights and configuration into a strict Hugging Face artifact without pretending it is a stock OLMo model.

operations.after: strict custom ConceptLM Hugging Face model-only export
operations.rationale: Provide a portable artifact while preserving the non-stock compatibility boundary.

analysis.conclusion: The exporter implementation is pinned, but no public artifact digest or independent reload report is available.
limitations: The exported model artifact itself is not available by content hash.
The artifact does not make stock vLLM compatible with ConceptLM.

evidence.summary: Adds strict model-only Hugging Face export and its launcher.
Exporter validates expected model keys while preserving the custom ConceptLM compatibility boundary.

work-repo.note: Derived private work-repository evidence; never root or official OLMo-3 provenance.
